channel.title: BenjaminVogt on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in BenjaminVogt on Nature Works

item.title: Ornamental natives
item.description:
Benjamin Vogt is a big US proponent of ornamental native prairie gardens. But I am thinking, what if forest gardens?

Tonight I was supposed to be watching Benjamin Vogt’s seminar ‘Designing With Commonly Available Native Plants’ (he has an online class by the same name as well). http://localhost:1313/blog/230330-ornamental-natives/

item.title: Benjamin Vogt & Fellowship of the Trees videos
item.description: The two videos have been published! Putting here for reference: http://localhost:1313/blog/230126-videos/

item.title: Benjamin Vogt & Wildlife Trees
item.description:
No, not a prairie woodland mash up but two separate online events in one evening

I have a lot of time for Benjamin Vogt. He’s an ornamental native plant gardener, which means he’s a wildlife gardener by default. http://localhost:1313/blog/230124-vogt-trees/
